judgment.summary: The business features high-margin growth and massive cash generation supported by strong analyst expectations.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 2.05 beat the 2.02 estimate by 1.3%, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-06-03.
positives: PEG ratio 0.96 — suggests attractive valuation relative to growth.
Forward P/E 23.19 vs trailing 82.35 — implies significant earnings expansion.
Gross margin 76.7% — reflects very high profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) $25.50B — demonstrates massive cash generation.
Analyst growth estimate for current FY 67.4% — indicates strong upcoming momentum.
negatives: Trailing P/E 82.35 — reflects a high historical valuation.
Price/Sales (TTM) 29.41 — indicates a high premium relative to revenue.
Price/Book 25.15 — indicates the stock is priced at a high premium to book value.
Beta 1.44 — implies higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Broadcom is navigating a broader semiconductor sector selloff driven by inflation concerns affecting major chip stocks. Despite this macro pressure, TD Cowen has significantly raised its price target for AVGO to $500 while maintaining a buy rating. Traders should weigh this sector-wide volatility against the recent positive analyst adjustment.
